## What is Klaviyo?

Klaviyo is a customer platform purpose-built for B2C businesses, combining email and SMS marketing, a customer data platform, and AI-powered automation in a single tool. It is the dominant marketing CRM in the Shopify ecosystem, with deep native integrations across ecommerce platforms.

## Who is it for?

Klaviyo is best suited for direct-to-consumer brands, online retailers, and ecommerce stores of any size. It fits marketing teams that need granular segmentation and automated lifecycle messaging without a separate CDP.

## Strengths

- **Ecommerce integrations** — native, deep connections with Shopify, WooCommerce, Wix, and 350+ other apps.
- **Segmentation engine** — build highly specific audiences from purchase behavior, browse history, and engagement data.
- **Omnichannel automation** — coordinate email, SMS, RCS, WhatsApp, and push notifications from one workflow builder.
- **AI features** — built-in AI for subject line suggestions, send-time optimization, and predictive lifetime value.
- **Free tier** — genuinely functional free plan for up to 250 active profiles, no time limit.

## What to consider

- Pricing scales quickly with contact list size and can become expensive for large databases.
- SMS and some advanced channels are separate add-ons billed on top of the base plan.
- Email support is only available for 60 days on the free plan; ongoing support requires a paid tier.

## Bottom line

Klaviyo is the go-to marketing CRM for ecommerce brands that want sophisticated automation without stitching together separate tools. If you sell direct-to-consumer and need revenue-attributed campaigns, it is hard to beat — just plan for costs to grow with your list.
